name: A Polyphenol-Rich Diet Increases the Gut Microbiota Metabolite Indole 3-Propionic Acid in Older Adults with Preserved Kidney Function.
summary: A randomized controlled crossover diet trial in 51 adults aged at least 60 years reporting increased serum indole-3-propionic acid in participants with preserved kidney function after an 8-week polyphenol-rich diet.
